mapper.select: select id, code, battery, latitude, longitude, ride_status, fault_status, create_time from scooter where code = #{code} limit 1

select id, code, battery, latitude, longitude, ride_status, fault_status, create_time from scooter where longitude is not null and latitude is not null and longitude between #{minLongitude} and #{maxLongitude} and latitude between #{minLatitude} and #{maxLatitude} order by id desc limit 200
mapper.update: update scooter set ride_status = #{rideStatus}, fault_status = #{faultStatus}, battery = #{battery}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} where id = #{id}
